title: Krougal Cauldron Concrete
description:
Vanilla Tweaks Cauldron Concrete with my own additions.
Drop concrete powder into a cauldron filled with water to instantly harden all of it. Drop magma in to convert to obsidian. Drop a poisonous potato in to turn it into a normal potato.
body:
Vanilla Tweaks Cauldron Concrete with my own additions. Drop concrete powder into a cauldron filled with water to instantly harden all of it. Drop magma in to convert to obsidian. Drop a poisonous potato in to turn it into a normal potato.
Posted in accordance with https://vanillatweaks.net/terms/
